#define RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS 100.0

Functions

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void mirror_cleanup (void )

Definition at line 98 of file mirror.c.

98                           {
99   if (g_digital_rain) {
100     digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
101     g_digital_rain = NULL;
102   }
103   if (g_last_rain_output) {

106   }
107   options_state_destroy();
108   platform_destroy();

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * mirror_convert_frame (uint8_t * rgba_data, int src_width, int
  src_height)


Definition at line 116 of file mirror.c.


116                                                                               {
117   if (!rgba_data || src_width <= 0 || src_height <= 0) {
118     return NULL;
119   }
120 
121   // Get current settings from options or terminal detection
122   int dst_width = (int)terminal_get_effective_width();
123   int dst_height = (int)terminal_get_effective_height();
124   color_filter_t filter = (color_filter_t)GET_OPTION(color_filter);
125   terminal_color_mode_t color_mode = (terminal_color_mode_t)GET_OPTION(color_mode);
126   palette_type_t palette_type = (palette_type_t)GET_OPTION(palette_type);
127   bool aspect_ratio = true; // Preserve webcam aspect ratio
128   bool stretch = false;     // Don't stretch - maintain proportions
129 
130   // Build terminal capabilities structure with user's color mode
131   terminal_capabilities_t caps = {0}; // Zero-initialize all fields first
132   caps.color_level = color_mode;
133   caps.capabilities = 0;
134   caps.color_count = (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_NONE)  ? 0
135                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_16)  ? 16
136                      : (color_mode == TERM_COLOR_256) ? 256
137                                                       : 16777216;
138   caps.utf8_support = true;
139   caps.detection_reliable = true;
140   caps.render_mode = (render_mode_t)GET_OPTION(render_mode);
141   caps.wants_background = false;
142   caps.wants_padding = true; // Enable padding for centering in mirror mode
143   caps.palette_type = palette_type;
144   caps.desired_fps = 60;
145   caps.color_filter = filter;
146 
147   // Convert RGBA to RGB (strip alpha channel) and optionally flip horizontally
148   rgb_pixel_t *rgb_pixels = SAFE_MALLOC(src_width * src_height * sizeof(rgb_pixel_t), rgb_pixel_t *);
149   if (!rgb_pixels) {
150     return NULL;
151   }
152 
153   bool flip = GET_OPTION(flip_x);
154   for (int y = 0; y < src_height; y++) {
155     for (int x = 0; x < src_width; x++) {
156       int src_x = flip ? (src_width - 1 - x) : x;
157       int src_idx = (y * src_width + src_x) * 4;
158       int dst_idx = y * src_width + x;
159 
160       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].r = rgba_data[src_idx + 0];
161       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].g = rgba_data[src_idx + 1];
162       rgb_pixels[dst_idx].b = rgba_data[src_idx + 2];
163       // Alpha (rgba_data[src_idx + 3]) is discarded
164     }
165   }
166 
167   // Apply color filter to pixels if needed (except rainbow - handled in ANSI stage)
168   if (filter != COLOR_FILTER_NONE && filter != COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
169     // color_filter operates on packed RGB24 format
170     uint8_t *rgb24 = (uint8_t *)rgb_pixels;
171     int stride = src_width * 3;
172     float time_seconds = (float)(emscripten_get_now() / 1000.0); // Convert ms to seconds
173     apply_color_filter(rgb24, src_width, src_height, stride, filter, time_seconds);
174   }
175 
176   // Create image structure
177   image_t img = {.w = src_width, .h = src_height, .pixels = rgb_pixels, .alloc_method = IMAGE_ALLOC_SIMD};
178 
179   // Get palette characters based on selected palette type
180   const char *palette_chars;
181   switch (palette_type) {
182   case PALETTE_BLOCKS:
183     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_BLOCKS;
184     break;
185   case PALETTE_DIGITAL:
186     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_DIGITAL;
187     break;
188   case PALETTE_MINIMAL:
189     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_MINIMAL;
190     break;
191   case PALETTE_COOL:
192     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_COOL;
193     break;
194   case PALETTE_CUSTOM:
195     // Custom palette uses user-provided characters from options
196     palette_chars = GET_OPTION(palette_custom);
197     if (!palette_chars || palette_chars[0] == '\0') {
198       palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD; // Fallback
199     }
200     break;
201   case PALETTE_STANDARD:
202   default:
203     palette_chars = PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD;
204     break;
205   }
206 
207   // Convert to ASCII using capability-aware function
208   char *ascii_output =
209       ascii_convert_with_capabilities(&img, dst_width, dst_height, &caps, aspect_ratio, stretch, palette_chars);
210 
211   // Clean up
212   SAFE_FREE(rgb_pixels);
213 
214   if (!ascii_output) {
215     log_error("ascii_convert_with_capabilities returned NULL");
216     return NULL;
217   }
218 
219   // Apply rainbow color filter to ANSI output by replacing RGB values
220   // This preserves character selection while applying rainbow colors
221   if (filter == COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW) {
222     float time_seconds = (float)(emscripten_get_now() / 1000.0); // Convert ms to seconds
223     char *rainbow_output = rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(ascii_output, time_seconds);
224     if (rainbow_output) {
225       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
226       ascii_output = rainbow_output;
227     }
228   }
229 
230   // Apply digital rain effect if enabled
231   bool matrix_rain = GET_OPTION(matrix_rain);
232   if (matrix_rain) {
233     // Initialize digital rain context if needed or dimensions changed
234     if (!g_digital_rain || g_digital_rain->num_columns != dst_width || g_digital_rain->num_rows != dst_height) {
235       if (g_digital_rain) {
236         digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
237       }
238       if (g_last_rain_output) {
239         SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
240         g_last_rain_output = NULL;
241       }
242       g_digital_rain = digital_rain_init(dst_width, dst_height);
243       if (!g_digital_rain) {
244         log_error("Failed to initialize digital rain effect");
245         return ascii_output; // Return without effect on error
246       }
247       g_last_rain_update_time = emscripten_get_now();
248     }
249 
250     // Update color from active filter (allows filter changes after initialization)
251     digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(g_digital_rain, filter);
252 
253     // Time-based updates: only update effect every RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS
254     double current_time = emscripten_get_now();
255     double elapsed_ms = current_time - g_last_rain_update_time;
256 
257     if (elapsed_ms >= RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS) {
258       // Calculate actual delta time in seconds
259       float delta_time = (float)(elapsed_ms / 1000.0);
260       g_last_rain_update_time = current_time;
261 
262       // Apply effect and cache a copy
263       char *rain_output = digital_rain_apply(g_digital_rain, ascii_output, delta_time);
264       if (rain_output) {
265         // Free old cached output
266         if (g_last_rain_output) {
267           SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
268         }
269         // Cache a copy (we'll return the original rain_output)
270         g_last_rain_output = strdup(rain_output);
271         // Return the rain output (caller will free it)
272         SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
273         ascii_output = rain_output;
274       }
275     } else if (g_last_rain_output) {
276       // Use cached output
277       SAFE_FREE(ascii_output);
278       ascii_output = strdup(g_last_rain_output);
279     }
280   } else {
281     // Clean up digital rain context if it exists but effect is disabled
282     if (g_digital_rain) {
283       digital_rain_destroy(g_digital_rain);
284       g_digital_rain = NULL;
285     }
286     if (g_last_rain_output) {
287       SAFE_FREE(g_last_rain_output);
288       g_last_rain_output = NULL;
289     }
290     g_last_rain_update_time = 0.0;
291   }
292 
293   return ascii_output;
294 }






References apply_color_filter(),
    ascii_convert_with_capabilities(), aspect_ratio(),
    rgb_pixel_t::b, terminal_capabilities_t::capabilities,
    terminal_capabilities_t::color_count,
    terminal_capabilities_t::color_filter, COLOR_FILTER_NONE,
    COLOR_FILTER_RAINBOW, terminal_capabilities_t::color_level,
    terminal_capabilities_t::desired_fps,
    terminal_capabilities_t::detection_reliable,
    digital_rain_apply(), digital_rain_destroy(),
    digital_rain_init(), digital_rain_set_color_from_filter(),
    rgb_pixel_t::g, GET_OPTION, IMAGE_ALLOC_SIMD,
    log_error, PALETTE_BLOCKS, PALETTE_CHARS_BLOCKS,
    PALETTE_CHARS_COOL, PALETTE_CHARS_DIGITAL,
    PALETTE_CHARS_MINIMAL, PALETTE_CHARS_STANDARD,
    PALETTE_COOL, PALETTE_CUSTOM, PALETTE_DIGITAL,
    PALETTE_MINIMAL, PALETTE_STANDARD,
    terminal_capabilities_t::palette_type, rgb_pixel_t::r,
    RAIN_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS, rainbow_replace_ansi_colors(),
    terminal_capabilities_t::render_mode, SAFE_FREE,
    SAFE_MALLOC, TERM_COLOR_16, TERM_COLOR_256,
    TERM_COLOR_NONE, terminal_get_effective_height(),
    terminal_get_effective_width(),
    terminal_capabilities_t::utf8_support,
    terminal_capabilities_t::wants_background, and
    terminal_capabilities_t::wants_padding.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void mirror_free_string (char * ptr)


Definition at line 297 of file mirror.c.


297                                    {
298   SAFE_FREE(ptr);
299 }






References SAFE_FREE.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int mirror_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize mirror mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json JSON array of argument strings, e.g.
  ["mirror", "--width", "80",
  "--height", "40"]


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 44 of file mirror.c.


44                                                  {
45   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: START");
46   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: After START log");
47 
48   // Initialize platform layer
49   WASM_LOG("Calling platform_init...");
50   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: About to call platform_init");
51   asciichat_error_t err = platform_init();
52   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: platform_init returned");
53   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
54     WASM_ERROR("platform_init FAILED");
55     return -1;
56   }
57   WASM_LOG("platform_init OK");
58 
59   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
60   WASM_LOG("Calling log_init...");
61   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEV, true, false);
62   // Use debug-style format in WASM so browser console shows full log headers
63   log_set_format(OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, false);
64   WASM_LOG("log_init OK");
65 
66   // Parse space-separated arguments
67   WASM_LOG("Parsing arguments...");
68   char *args_copy = NULL;
69   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
70   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
71   if (argc < 0) {
72     WASM_ERROR("strdup FAILED");
73     return -1;
74   }
75   WASM_LOG_INT("Parsed arguments, argc", argc);
76 
77   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
78   WASM_LOG("Calling options_init...");
79   err = options_init(argc, argv);
80   free(args_copy);
81 
82   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
83     WASM_LOG_INT("options_init FAILED", err);
84     return -1;
85   }
86   WASM_LOG("options_init OK");
87 
88   // Initialize ANSI color code generation (dec3 cache for RGB values)
89   WASM_LOG("Calling ansi_fast_init...");
90   ansi_fast_init();
91   WASM_LOG("ansi_fast_init OK");
92 
93   WASM_LOG("mirror_init_with_args: COMPLETE");
94   return 0;
95 }






References ansi_fast_init(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    LOG_DEV, log_init(), log_set_format(),
    OPT_LOG_TEMPLATE_DEFAULT_DEBUG, options_init(),
    platform_init(), WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG,
    WASM_LOG_INT, and wasm_parse_args().
